Title: MemorySmith.Agent — WorldState & Projector System
Content:
WorldState (Agent.Core/Models/WorldState.cs) is an immutable record serving as the central fact store. It is updated by WorldStateProjector (pure stateless projector) which applies WorldEvent records via pattern matching.

## WorldState Record

Fields:
- AgentId (string)
- Position (Position record: int X=0, Y=64, Z=0)
- Health (int, default 20)
- Food (int, default 20)
- GameMode (string?, nullable)
- Inventory (Dictionary<string, int> — item name → count, minecraft: prefix stripped)
- Facts (Dictionary<string, object?> — legacy flat facts, being superseded by StructuredFacts)
- StructuredFacts (IReadOnlyList<Fact> — provenance-tracked, time-ordered oldest first, MaxFacts=1000)
- UpdatedAt (DateTimeOffset)
- IsInventoryStale (bool) — Sprint 21 P0-A flag, set true on SetGoal, cleared by ApplyStatus
- IsCreativeMode (bool, computed) — checks GameMode field or Facts['world:gamemode'] for 'creative'/'creative mode'

## WorldStateProjector (Agent.Core/WorldStateProjector.cs)

Apply(WorldState current, WorldEvent ev) is a single pattern-match dispatch:

| Event | Handler | Effect |
|-------|---------|--------|
| SpawnEvent | ApplySpawn | Sets Position, Health, Food |
| HealthEvent | ApplyHealth | Sets Health, Food |
| GameModeChangedEvent | ApplyGameModeChanged | Sets GameMode + writes world:gamemode fact |
| DamageTakenEvent | StoreFacts only | Sprint 23: synthetic C# event; facts only |
| MoveEvent | ApplyMove | Sets Position |
| BlockMinedEvent | ApplyBlockMined | Increments inventory (self-dropping blocks via SelfDroppingBlocks HashSet + BlockToItemDrop dict) |
| ItemCollectedEvent | ApplyItemCollected | Sprint 35 P0-A: authoritative inventory update via playerCollect |
| MineCompleteEvent | StoreFacts only | Sprint 35 P0-B: lifecycle facts only |
| ItemCraftedEvent | ApplyItemCrafted | Sprint 36 P1-B: inventory increment |
| ItemConsumedEvent | ApplyItemConsumed | Sprint 38 P4-A: inventory deduction (clamped at 0) |
| StatusEvent | ApplyStatus | Full state sync + clears IsInventoryStale + updates GameMode |
| Everything else | StoreFacts | No structured state change; raw facts only |

## Key Inventory Logic

- ApplyBlockMined: Uses SelfDroppingBlocks HashSet (dirt, stone, sand, gravel, etc.) for direct drops. Falls back to BlockToItemDrop Dictionary (diamond_ore→diamond, stone→cobblestone, etc.) for ore mappings.
- ApplyItemCollected: Strips minecraft: prefix, calls AddInventoryItem. This is the authoritative source (playerCollect event, Sprint 35 P0-A).
- ApplyStatus: Full inventory replacement via SetInventory + NormalizeInventory (strips minecraft: prefixes). Clears IsInventoryStale.
- NormalizeInventory: Fast-path returns original if no colon keys; otherwise rebuilds with prefix stripped and counts merged.

## Inventory Staleness

- IsInventoryStale = true when SetGoal is called (Sprint 21 P0-A)
- GenericGatherGoal.IsComplete and CraftItemGoal.IsComplete return false while stale
- Cleared by ApplyStatus on fresh StatusEvent
- Prevents false completion after admin /clear or unobserved inventory changes

## Position Tracking

- Default spawn: (0, 64, 0)
- Set by: SpawnEvent → ApplySpawn, MoveEvent → ApplyMove, StatusEvent → ApplyStatus
- Also stored as fact 'event:Move:Pos'

## Builder Pattern

WorldState.Builder nested class provides mutable methods: SetHealth, SetFood, SetPosition, SetGameMode, SetFact (with provenance), SetInventory, AddInventoryItem, SetInventoryStale. Build() finalizes with UpdatedAt timestamp.
